Fig. 3. Visualization of 2D t-SNE on DEAP. Each column corresponds to the data from a randomly selected subject. Top row: Visualization of the original label. Middle row: The enhanced labels show hard labels (H) in darker colors and soft labels (S) in lighter colors. Bottom row: Highlight the soft labels against a transparent background, it can be seen that they are concentrated at the classification boundaries.
